get.description: Returns service health status with dependency checks

post.description: Creates a new API key for the authenticated user. The plaintext key is only returned once in this response.

name.description: Human-readable name for the API key
Human-readable name for the API key
Human-readable name for the API key

get.description: Retrieves all API keys for the authenticated user. Plaintext keys are never returned.

delete.description: Revokes an API key by setting its revokedAt timestamp. The key will no longer be valid for authentication.

id.description: ID of the revoked API key

post.summary: Create a new URL scan job
post.description: Creates a new URL scan job and deducts credits from the user's wallet. If an in-flight or recently completed scan for the same URL exists, returns the existing scan without charging credits (deduplicated: true).

state.description: Current state of the scan job. COMPLETED when returned from cache (deduplicated); in-progress states when a new or in-flight job is returned.

deduplicated.description: True if this request returned an existing scan (in-flight or cached completed) instead of creating a new one

metadata.description: Optional metadata to associate with the scan
Optional metadata to associate with the scan
Optional metadata to associate with the scan

get.description: Returns the user's scan jobs, most recent first. Optional query batchId to list only jobs from a batch (e.g. from POST /v1/scans/batch).

post.summary: Create a batch of URL scan jobs
post.description: Creates multiple scan jobs in one request. Deducts credits only for URLs that need new scans. If an in-flight or recently completed scan exists for a URL, returns the existing scan (deduplicated: true). Max 50 URLs per batch. Returns batchId for listing via GET /v1/scans?batchId=.

batchId.description: Batch ID for listing jobs by batch

state.description: Current state (may be in-progress if deduplicated)

deduplicated.description: True if this URL returned an existing in-flight scan instead of creating a new one

get.description: Returns observability data for a scan job: LLM calls (triage, vision, synthesis) with tokens, cost, latency.

get.summary: Stream scan state changes via SSE
get.description: Opens a Server-Sent Events stream that emits a state event immediately on connect, then on every state transition until a terminal state (COMPLETED, FAILED, TIMED_OUT) is reached.

get.summary: Get scan result by job ID
get.description: Retrieves the scan result for a specific job ID. Returns the full result if completed, or status if in progress.
Retrieves the current credit balance for the user

post.description: Purchase credits using crypto or other payment methods. This is a stub implementation.

get.description: Retrieves user-defined settings including safe/unsafe domain patterns.

put.description: Updates user-defined settings like domain glob patterns for short-circuiting.

name.description: Human-readable name for the API key

id.description: ID of the revoked API key

metadata.description: Optional metadata to associate with the scan

state.description: Current state of the scan job. COMPLETED when returned from cache (deduplicated); in-progress states when a new or in-flight job is returned.

deduplicated.description: True if this request returned an existing scan (in-flight or cached completed) instead of creating a new one

batchId.description: Batch ID for listing jobs by batch

state.description: Current state (may be in-progress if deduplicated)

deduplicated.description: True if this URL returned an existing in-flight scan instead of creating a new one
